zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward De Burton於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Walter de Burton52歲，母親Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford45歲。他於1350年與Agnes de Hill在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1371年在英國史洛普爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1355年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward De Burton于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃时，他的父亲Walter de Burton52岁，母亲Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford45岁。他于1350年与Agnes de Hill在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1371年在英国史洛普爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1355年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward De Burton was born about 1335, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Burton, was 52 and his mother, Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, was 45. He married Agnes de Hill in 1350, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1371, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Shropshire, England. He died in 1355, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward De Burton est né environ 1335, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Burton, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Hill en 1350, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1371, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Shropshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1355, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward De Burton um 1335 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Burton 52 und seine Mutter Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford 45. Er hat 1350 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1371 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Shropshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward De Burton è nato il circa 1335 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Burton, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Hill nel 1350, nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1371, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Shropshire, England. Morì nel 1355, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボン
ja.lifeSummary: Edward De Burtonが約1335年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Walter de Burtonは52歳，母Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratfordは45歳であった。1350年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンでAgnes de Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1371年，イギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1355年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward De Burton(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Burton(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 Agnes de Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1371년, 그의 직업은 영국 슈럽실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward De Burton nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Burton, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Hill em 1350, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1371, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward De Burton родился около 1335 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Burton было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Hill в 1350 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1371 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности шропшир, Англия. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward De Burton nació aproximadamente 1335, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Burton, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Mrs Alice De Burton Of Stratford, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Agnes de Hill en 1350, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1371, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1355, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
